skill_purpose: Review nutritional, wellness, and implied health benefit claims for substantiation alignment and permitted wording scope.
summary: Detects health and nutrition benefit claims on supplements and general products; guides reviewers to verify classification, substantiation, and prohibited disease-style wording.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Nutritional, wellness, or implied health benefit language on ad copy or imagery. ACTION: Inspect product category and on-pack classification before assessing claim scope. CHECK: Ingredient lists, dosage claims, before/after wellness outcomes, and disease-implication phrases. ESCALATE IF: Copy implies cure, disease modification, or medicinal effect — route to Rule Corpus for binding decision.

detection_patterns.description: Implied health or nutrition benefits on non-health or misclassified product categories.

checkpoint_actions: Confirm product regulatory category matches claim type
Check whether substantiation documents are on file
Flag disease or cure language for legal escalation
escalation_hints: Escalate to legal when health claim appears on non-permitted product class
Escalate when substantiation is missing for high-visibility claims
